mission.title: Weekly Backup Job Verification
mission.description: Recurring orbit mission that verifies backup CronJobs are running successfully. Checks Velero backups, CronJob completion status, and PersistentVolume snapshot health to ensure disaster recovery readiness.

steps.title: Check CronJob health and recent completions
steps.description: List all CronJobs and verify they have completed successfully in their expected schedule window.

validation.command: kubectl get cronjobs -A -o json | jq '[.items[] | select(.spec.suspend != true) | select(.status.lastSuccessfulTime == null)] | length'

steps.title: Detect failed or stuck Jobs from CronJobs
steps.description: Find Jobs created by CronJobs that have failed or are running beyond their expected duration.
commands: kubectl get jobs -A -o json | jq -r '.items[] | select(.status.failed > 0) | "FAILED: \(.metadata.namespace)/\(.metadata.name) failures=\(.status.failed)"'
kubectl get jobs -A -o json | jq -r '.items[] | select(.status.active > 0) | select(.status.startTime) | "RUNNING: \(.metadata.namespace)/\(.metadata.name) since=\(.status.startTime)"'

steps.title: Verify Velero backup status
steps.description: Check Velero backup schedules and recent backup completion status. Skip if Velero is not installed.
commands: kubectl get backupschedules.velero.io -A 2>/dev/null || echo 'Velero not installed — skipping'
kubectl get backups.velero.io -A --sort-by=.metadata.creationTimestamp 2>/dev/null | tail -10 || echo 'No Velero backups found'

validation.command: kubectl get backups.velero.io -A -o json 2>/dev/null | jq '[.items[-5:] | .[] | select(.status.phase != "Completed")] | length' 2>/dev/null || echo 0

steps.title: Check VolumeSnapshot health
steps.description: Verify PersistentVolume snapshots are in a ready state and not accumulating errors.
commands: kubectl get volumesnapshots -A -o custom-columns='NAMESPACE:.metadata.namespace,NAME:.metadata.name,READY:.status.readyToUse,SIZE:.status.restoreSize,AGE:.metadata.creationTimestamp' 2>/dev/null || echo 'VolumeSnapshot CRDs not installed'
kubectl get volumesnapshots -A -o json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.items[] | select(.status.readyToUse != true) | "NOT READY: \(.metadata.namespace)/\(.metadata.name)"' 2>/dev/null

steps.title: Review backup-related events and errors
steps.description: Check for recent events related to backup failures, volume snapshot errors, or CronJob problems.

resolution.summary: Backup verification complete. All CronJobs, Velero backups, and VolumeSnapshots have been checked for health and successful completion.

prerequisites.description: Requires kubectl with cluster access and jq for JSON parsing. Velero and VolumeSnapshot CRDs are optional but checked if present.
